programme.title: The Idea of You

After watching Yinxi's interview about SHERO, Yinchen decides to take over the company to continue her sister's legacy...

On their journey, they meet Tang Lian who is a disciple of the Tang sect. Together, the group of youths embark on an adventure.

Its tasteless, odorless powder blends effortlessly into any food or drink, making it perfect for daily joint care, especially for those who prefer not to take pills.

programme.title: Against All Odds - EP 6 隐形
programme.desc: This heartfelt local documentary celebrates a community of individuals with special needs. It shares the lives of those with Down syndrome, autism, intellectual disabilities, and other challenges.

programme.title: Fixer S4 - EP 11 线人 4
programme.desc: As immigration policies in Northern Europe tighten, refugees seeking asylum have changed their route to Portugal & making it a popular immigrants' destination. After generational change, how living conditions of these immigrants have changed & how their descendants integrate into Portuguese society?

programme.title: Bravo, My Life - EP 29 加油我的人生
programme.desc: This series follows Xu Dongxi as she decides to raise her nephew as a single mother while struggling to establish herself as a designer.

programme.title: Devil-in-Law - EP 23 强悍媳妇
programme.desc: Wen Li managed to escape from her kidnappers. At the hospital, she confronts Mdm Ruan about the kidnapping.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 63 火鸟2020
programme.desc: Minghua notices a strange man coming to the company to look for Enzhu and begins to suspect her background. Enzhu orders Yang Rentie to harm Zhi-en in the studio, unaware that the entire act is caught on camera by Minghua's assistant.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 64 火鸟2020
programme.desc: Zhi-en and Zhengmin are ready for their big day. However, on the wedding day, Zhi-en fails to show up. When Zhengmin learns that she is missing, he is stunned and fears she might be running away.

programme.title: Let's Go Home S3 - EP 10 我们回家吧 (第三季)
programme.desc: Let’s Go Home 3 makes a return, bringing a cross-border journey filled with new emotions and surprises! Led by host Bowie Tsang, the show brings together a lineup of cross-industry celebrity guests — including Hsieh Ying-Hsuan, Annie Chen, Ethan Ruan, Tanya Chua and more — as they embark on a heartfelt journey home, rediscovering their most genuine connections with their hometowns, families, and themselves.

programme.title: My Happy Ending - EP 16 我的幸福结局
programme.desc: Zaiyuan is released from the rehabilitation center and collects evidence to prove who truly killed Shunyong.

programme.title: News Tonight 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Let's Go Home S3 - EP 10 我们回家吧 (第三季)
programme.desc: Let’s Go Home 3 makes a return, bringing a cross-border journey filled with new emotions and surprises! Led by host Bowie Tsang, the show brings together a lineup of cross-industry celebrity guests — including Hsieh Ying-Hsuan, Annie Chen, Ethan Ruan, Tanya Chua and more — as they embark on a heartfelt journey home, rediscovering their most genuine connections with their hometowns, families, and themselves.

programme.title: Papa Pilot
programme.desc: As a pilot, Ashraf often faces many challenges in each of his flights. These include the ultimate sacrifice of living far away from his family for 5 years. Now he is finally back home, by his family's side, only to face the ultimate turbulence of them all, the Covid pandemic. Can our papa pilot overcome this difficult new obstacle?

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 9
programme.desc: Asri is falsely accused of embezzling funds by his ex employer at One Up Agency. He is remanded and tries to seek Hani's help to bail him out. While Herzy and Ema keep Asri's predicament a secret from the rest at Raja Bundle, Zafrul blatantly reveals to Amirul about Asri.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 10
programme.desc: Asri is determined not to let the setbacks befall him lately to affect Raja Bundle. Asri comes up with a new marketing and business plan for his HBB sellers. However, Kak Sal became increasingly suspicious when the police came to seize Asri's business accounts. Amirul urges Hani to accept Zafrul's proposal. Asri is confident he knows the identity of the culprit who had framed him for embezzlement. Asri confronts the perpetrator.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 11
programme.desc: Due to online trolls, Asri and his team must deal with the allegations against him which have now affected his sales. As he tries to find solutions, Asri is beset by more problems as Kak Sal and Ema both have differing issues that come to the fore.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 12
programme.desc: Asri is focused on getting things ready for his big online battle with Madi Lambung as he ensures that every detail is covered. Things also become clearer for Hani, Kak Cik and Ema with regards to their own wants and needs to move forward.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 13
programme.desc: The surprise that Asri has planned for the streaming showdown is going awry. Kak Cik and Ema are in dilemma if they could help. Hani begins to accept Zafrul's presence in her life when she sees Amirul's excitement in the wedding. Time is running out for Asri to prove his innocence and so will be Raja Bundle's.

programme.title: Anak Ayah
programme.desc: Anak Ayah is a bittersweet journey of a dedicated father who raised his daughter single-handedly, despite all adds. Just as her career starts to take off, he is diagnosed and illness and a dark secret he kept for 30 years threatens to tear their relationship apart.

programme.title: Stor Atuk - EP 9
programme.desc: Atuk Halim's storeroom is full of precious items and each of these items carried stories that links to the folklore that he shares with his grandchildren. Each time Atok Halim tells his story, audience will be brought on a memory walk back to when he was just a young teenage boy on an adventure with two of his buddies, Jo and Din in the 1970s.

programme.title: Makan Viral - EP 2
programme.desc: Makan Viral is a show where the host will travel to various destinations to test various foods and drinks, while meeting interesting people with interesting stories. The trip itself offers an interesting panoramic view with the opportunity to meet personalities who will share their passion for food and lifestyle.

programme.title: Fiesta Komedi S3 - EP 7
programme.desc: Fiesta Komedi is an entertainment series of one-act plays made into TV production. Literally translated as Theatre Of Comedies, it promises laughter from the beginning to the end. In this third season, Fiesta Komedi will spoof popular Malay dramas.

programme.title: Seoul Cinta - EP 6
programme.desc: While on the Seoul trip, Daniel realises that he may have feelings for Azra. Raisha becomes upset with Daniel when she sees him caring for Azra.

programme.title: Baby-Sita
programme.desc: Ibrahim, Musa and Anis are professional robbers. Ibrahim is haunted by family-themed holiday advertisements that touch his heart because he has never experienced Aidilfitri with his family

programme.title: Setulus Hati - EP 32
programme.desc: Setulus Hati tells the story of a pilot and flight attendant, Alvino and Rossa. Their marriage looks perfect and harmonious. But apparently, the presence of Lia, who is Rossa's best friend, actually becomes a thorn in Rossa and Alvino's marriage.

programme.title: You Know Nothing About Sports - EP 7
programme.desc: The You Know Nothing series returns with Sherry venturing into sports. She partners with a well-known celebrity to learn a new sport, coached by a celebrated athlete. Host : Sherry Alhadad

programme.title: 3 Mak Dara - EP 3
programme.desc: 3 Mak Dara follows Raja Azura, Sharifah Shahora and Rita Rudaini on a road trip across Malaysia in an RV. Through travel and activities, they share honest conversations about motherhood,friendship, careers, relationships, social media and personal growth, blending humour, emotion and inspiration in a relatable lifestyle series.

programme.title: Air Mata Ayah
programme.desc: Air Mata Ayah is a heart-warming telemovie directed by Serwahyuni Jaes in conjunction with Fathers' Day 2022. This telemovie tells a tale about Mahmud, a strict and controlling retired teacher with unwavering expectations of his children, even as they step into adulthood. Failing to see their father's good intention, his children, Ali and Aisyah reciprocated with growing disrespect and hatred towards him.

programme.title: Stor Atuk - EP 9

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - ASD Hybrid 3-ply Hex Wok 32 & 36cm
programme.desc: This cookware is made with strong stainless steel and a long-lasting non-stick coating from Whitford (USA). Its 7-layer design ensures even heat distribution and helps keep heat longer, providing great cooking results every time. Perfect for those looking for high-quality, easy-to-use kitchen tools. ASD爱仕达316不锈钢不粘炒锅采用三层钢结构与耐高温不粘涂层，结合了不锈钢的耐用与不粘锅的便捷。蜂窝纹理设计省油防粘，食材加热均匀，不怕铁铲和钢丝球刮擦，适合烹饪各种坚硬食材。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Clean V2 Cordless Vacuum Cleaner
programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. Its ultra-strong suction power and multi-stage filtration system capture even the finest dust in your homes. Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery. Acerpure V2 无线吸尘机， 四种刷头，满足全屋清洁需求。 1.37公斤超轻无线主机，轻盈好超控。三档模式，20000pa强劲气旋吸力，灰尘一扫而空。多角度掌控自如，让您更顺畅地左右移动，滑行或转向。轻巧却强劲有力，是您最佳的清洁伙伴。

programme.title: River Monsters: Amazon Titanic - River Monsters: Amazon Titanic
programme.desc: It was supposed to be the safest boat in the Amazon, but when Sobral Santos II sank by the remote town of Obidos on the night of September 21st 1981 more than 300 people died. What had laid into the passengers?

programme.title: River Monsters: Invisible Killers - River Monsters: Invisible Killers
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade looks at dark and deadly creatures - parasites.

programme.title: River Monsters Compilations - Killer Weapons
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade takes a look back some of the killer fish he has encountered in the series.

programme.title: River Monsters Compilations - Lethal Legends
programme.desc: Do underwater creatures with grasping hands stalk children in Japan on the Zambezi?

programme.title: River Monsters Compilations - The Deadliest Encounters
programme.desc: What does it take to subdue a giant snakehead or wrangle a wolf fish?

programme.title: River Monsters Compilations - Killer Sharks and Rays
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade relives some of his most dangerous catches.

programme.title: River Monsters Compilations - The Deadliest Catfish
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade relives some of his most frightening encounters with catfish.

programme.title: River Monsters Compilations - Untold Stories
programme.desc: Jeremy opens up and reveals some of the funnier, crazier, and downright scarier 'monster moments' that never made the final cut

programme.title: River Monsters: Top Ten - River Monsters: Top Ten
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade brings together the top ten biggest and baddest catches of his career.

programme.title: River Monsters: Lair of the Giants - Lair of the Giants (Part 1)
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade explores the Essequibo, Guyana's largest river.

programme.title: River Monsters: Lair of the Giants - Lair of the Giants (Part 2)
programme.desc: Jeremy continues his exploration of South Africa's rivers and lakes.

programme.title: River Monsters: Best of Series 1-5 - Monster Hunting Secrets
programme.desc: A compilation of the best bits from this extreme fishing series.

programme.title: River Monsters: Best of Series 1-5 - Toughest Cases
programme.desc: Another compilation of the best bits from this extreme fishing series.

programme.title: River Monsters: Best of Series 1-5 - US River Monsters
programme.desc: Another compilation of the best bits from this extreme fishing series.

programme.title: River Monsters: Best of Series 1-5 - Monsters in Unexpected Places
programme.desc: Another compilation of the best bits from this extreme fishing series.

programme.title: River Monsters: Best of Series 1-5 - Worst Nightmares aka Halloween Special
programme.desc: Another compilation of the best bits from this extreme fishing series.

programme.title: River Monsters: Amazon Titanic - River Monsters: Amazon Titanic
programme.desc: It was supposed to be the safest boat in the Amazon, but when Sobral Santos II sank by the remote town of Obidos on the night of September 21st 1981 more than 300 people died. What had laid into the passengers?

programme.title: River Monsters - European Maneater
programme.desc: Biologist and extreme angler Jeremy Wade investigates tales of a man-eating catfish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Colombian Slasher
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to Colombia to investigate a creature blamed for killing a new bride.

programme.title: River Monsters - Amazon Assassins
programme.desc: In the depths of the Amazon, legends tell of an evil spirit in a great fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Japanese Horrors
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is in Japan on the trail of the kappa, a fish about which legends abound.

programme.title: River Monsters - South Pacific Terrors
programme.desc: Attacks from unseen assailants in the remote mountains and jungles of Fiji's interior.

programme.title: River Monsters - The Mutilator
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to Papua New Guinea.

programme.title: River Monsters - Secrets of the Sea
programme.desc: Jeremy goes behind the scenes and we see what went into the making of a season at sea.

programme.title: River Monsters - Congo Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Congo River on the trail of the legend of the spirit Mami Wata.

programme.title: River Monsters - Return of the Killer Catfish
programme.desc: Could the original River Monster be back from the brink and back in business?

programme.title: Drink with God Season 2 - Drink with God Season 2 Ep. 30
programme.desc: From menbosha to dongpo pork, the undisputed master of Chinese cuisine who has won over countless taste buds?Chef Lee Yeon-bok joins the show. What innovative and delicious delivery dishes would he recommend to enjoy with his close friends?

programme.title: Seasonal Sister season 2 - Seasonal Sister season 2 Ep.9
programme.desc: The Busan branch of the Seasonal Tavern opens! Singers Eun Ga-eun and Kim Soo-chan bring explosive excitement from the moment they arrive.

programme.title: The Korean Dish Expedition - The Korean Dish Expedition Ep.9
programme.desc: The heirloom cuisine of Korea’s traditional clan families carries generations of wisdom rooted in harmony with nature. Some flavors have faded, others nearly forgotten?but at the refined yet simple tables set by the family matriarchs, viewers experience a moving journey back in time.

programme.title: Cheers Brother - Cheers Brother Episode 2
programme.desc: After meeting a guest, Dong-il and Chang-seop travel to Jeju Island to visit a distillery that produces Gosorisul using traditional methods. After tasting Jeju’s traditional cheongju and soju, the group decides to enjoy fresh local seafood from the island.

programme.desc: Let the tasty adventure begin! From culture shock to culinary delight?this is their fun-filled journey into the heart of K-food.

programme.title: A royal culinary class - A royal culinary class Lesson 1. “Guksu-bibim”
programme.desc: We’d tried to reproduce “Guksu-bibim” which was described as a simple dish enjoyed in daily life on the book 「Puinpilji」, written in Joseon Dynasty.

programme.desc: We’d tried to reproduce “Sengbogeo-eumjeok” (Pan-Fried Abalone Skewers) and "Semyeon" (Mung Bean Noodles in Omija Honey Water).

programme.desc: We’d tried to reproduce “Jang Jjanji” (Pickled Cucumber) and "Jeonbok Chimchae" (Stuffed Abalone in Salty Water).

programme.title: How Do You Know
programme.desc: After being cut from the U.S.A. softball team and feeling a bit past her prime, Lisa finds herself evaluating her life and in the middle of a love triangle, as a corporate guy in crisis competes with her current, baseball-playing beau.

programme.title: An Audience With Kylie
programme.desc: Global icon Kylie Minogue takes to the stage at London's Royal Albert Hall for the biggest Audience with... to date. Join Kylie as she looks back on the highlights of her five decades in showbiz, performs a dazzling array of her greatest hits and current floor-fillers, and answers questions from the specially invited VIP guests.

programme.title: My Best Friend's An Animal - EP 3
programme.desc: MY BEST FRIEND'S AN ANIMAL is an emotive, heart-warming series which tells the stories of humans who have unlikely and extraordinary friendships with wild animals. Featuring 6 compelling stories per episode and filmed all over the world. The series proves that when it comes to friendship, shape, size, or even species is irrelevant. Respect, trust, and understanding can be found in the most surprising places.

programme.desc: After the end of the Transformers' war, the Malto family moves to Witwicky, Pennsylvania, to start a new life but their lives soon get entangled with a group of Terran Transformers.

programme.title: Viking Skool - EP 17
programme.desc: Three young students, Erik, Ylva and Arni, embark on challenging and thrilling adventures while they train to become glorious Viking warriors.

programme.title: Pokemon Horizons: The Series - EP 17
programme.desc: The series stars two new protagonists, Liko and Roy, who team up with the Rising Volt Tacklers, a group of adventurers that explore the Pokmon world and visit various regions. As they do, they are pursued by the Explorers, a mysterious organization seeking Liko's pendant for unknown reasons.

programme.title: On The Red Dot - EP 4
programme.desc: Three women with chronic pain navigate work, relationships, fertility worries and independence, while managing conditions no one else can see.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights - EP 71
programme.desc: A charming film director using Aunty Lee’s Delights as a shooting location may not be what he seems. Can Aunty Lee and Cherril expose him before he strikes again?

programme.title: Kin - EP 356
programme.desc: Julius tips off Louis about Celia's plan to set him up with Madeline. Zara starts to realise something is up with her phone when Adina seems able to anticipate her every move.

programme.title: The Contenders 26 - EP 6
programme.desc: Canada welcome the world for the first time, Jordan reach the finals for the first time, and Son Heung-min is a born leader for South Korea.

programme.title: Mark Moriarty: Off Duty Chef - Series 3 - EP 4
programme.desc: From how to cook fish perfectly to balancing flavours and reimagining leftovers to save money and reduce waste, the new series will see Mark share a whole new set of recipes.

programme.title: The Chefs' Line - Series 1 - EP 47
programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef’s Line?

programme.title: Raid The Cage : Season 01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Two teams of two compete to take prizes from the Cage before the time limit expires and the doors close. Correct answers adds seconds to the clock, allowing to claim more rewards from the Cage. The winning team keeps what they grabbed.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42 - EP 142
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: The Catch - EP 1
programme.desc: In this brand new, adventurous and mouth-watering series FOUR of Singapore’s top chefs swap their high-society-city kitchens for Western Australia’s rugged landscapes and stunning food producing regions teaming up with 4 West Australian chefs to actually catch the produce. Let the culinary culture clash commence!

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights - EP 72
programme.desc: When Derek the Killer Director realises Cherril has seen through his carefully crafted façade, he decides the only way out is to silence his enemies.

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight
programme.desc: The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: Long Weekends - EP 8
programme.desc: We're back in Southeast Asia this week with a relaxing trip to Kuching! Join Ann Nicole as we watch her frolic with cats, take a boat ride, discover delectable foods and bring out her inner adventurer!

programme.title: Scene City: Office Incognita
programme.desc: Ever since the passing of her late husband five years ago, 65-year-old Beatrice started working as a cleaner at a financial advisory firm. At work, her teal blue uniform blends perfectly into the bleak and sterile backdrop of the corporate milieu. Most office workers pay her no heed unless her service is required --- which normally means spilled coffee or clogged toilets. Otherwise, her presence is virtually non-existent to all but a new temporary employee, Gwen, who never fails to greet her.

programme.title: Quantum Leap S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Set 30 years after Dr. Sam Beckett stepped into the Quantum Leap accelerator and vanished, follows a new team that must restart the project hoping to understand the mysteries behind the machine and its creator.

programme.title: Watson S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: Watson and the team are faced with an impossible choice when two lives hang in the balance, but they only have one vial of antidote available. Meanwhile, Shinwell races to help the team, and Watson goes head to head with Moriarty

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights - EP 72
programme.desc: When Derek the Killer Director realises Cherril has seen through his carefully crafted façade, he decides the only way out is to silence his enemies.

programme.title: Travel with Mommy - EP 10 带阿母去旅行
programme.desc: Top Hosts Jason Yeoh & Jack Lim create priceless mother-son memories, on a journey of love to check off their moms' travel wish lists. Join them in HK, Malaysia & Singapore on customised vacations.

programme.title: Kampong Ties - EP 27 甘榜情
programme.desc: Shuixian is forced by her foster mother to marry Lihai, whom later died in an accident, leaving Shuixian a young widow. Yueman is married to Jiaqing, an abusive man. One day, Shuixian accidentally kills Jiaqing but is saved by Yueman who claims Jiaqing was killed by his creditors. Both of them leave the village and meet Youbao, head of a secret society.

programme.title: Kampong Ties - EP 28 甘榜情

programme.title: Golden City - EP 527 多情城市
programme.desc: This drama is set in the Jiufen area from the 1960s to the 1970s. It tells the story of how three brothers conquered the world with their bare hands. Through the love story of the previous generation, it connects the common emotions between the two generations depicting the memories and in-depth exploration of the differences in values between them.

programme.title: Forbidding No More - EP 7 极境之旅
programme.desc: Iran, Cuba or North Korea are not exactly the most accessible countries. In fact most would balk at the idea of holidaying there. Stringent visa requirements and hard travel conditions are but some factors. But are they really inaccessible? "Forbidding No More" takes us to these countries to explore what culture and attractions these locations have to offer.

programme.title: News Tonight 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: My One And Only - EP 11 只此一家
programme.desc: Defu and Limin discover Baoyou's brothers want to send their father to a nursing home. Limin tries to expose Robert's true colors. Renpin fails to turn up for Leia's work gathering, Gordon tries to make a move on Leia. Neighbour Ah-Chao disrupts the renovation work at Jason's house. Wan Zi Xiong impersonates a Feng Shui master to help Ah-Chao but is exposed by Huiling...

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Yi Shi Yuan Tiger Milk Lung Cleanse
programme.desc: Developed by the Yi Si Yuan Medical Consultant Team, specially designed for respiratory health, strengthen immunity. It contains Tiger Milk Mushroom, Cordyceps, and Dendrobium Orchid, the exclusive formula helps maintain your lung's health, suitable for people with coughs, nasal allergies, recurrent colds. 忆思源虎乳芝净肺宝 由忆思源医药顾问团队专为维护呼吸系统健康、增强免疫力与日常保养而调配的独家配方。采用虎乳芝、冬虫夏草、石斛，三种珍贵药材；帮您先调理、后保健，有助于补肺气、维持肺部健康。适合咳嗽、鼻子过敏、反复感冒、长期曝露在空污环境的朋友服用。

programme.title: River Monsters - Body Snatcher
programme.desc: Jeremy is convinced a river monster is at large after hearing tales of a body-snatching.

programme.title: River Monsters - Atomic Assassin
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade braves the radiation in Chernobyl on the trail of a monster fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Jungle Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to the jungles of South America to track down a dangerous fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Mongolian Mauler
programme.desc: In Mongolia, Jeremy Wade investigates a rare giant fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Freshwater Shark
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the myth of the freshwater shark.

programme.title: River Monsters - Phantom Assassin
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade returns to Australia's Fitzroy River on his toughest quest yet.

programme.title: River Monsters - American Killer Catfish
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade visits tourist hotspots in the USA in search of river monsters.

programme.title: River Monsters - Coral Reef Killer
programme.desc: A mysterious sea creature impales victims on the island of Sulawesi in Indonesia.

programme.title: River Monsters - Vampires of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade embarks on a punishing mission to the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: River Monsters - Death Ray
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes to Thailand in search of the 700lb giant freshwater stingray.

programme.title: River Monsters - Hidden Predator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes to South Africa, where the biggest bull shark ever recorded was caught.

programme.title: River Monsters - Volcanic Island Terror
programme.desc: On a volcanic Pacific island, an ancient fishing community is being terrorised.

programme.title: River Monsters - Bone Crusher
programme.desc: In the remote Amazon, Jeremy Wade seeks a predator which cannot be caught with a rod.

programme.title: River Monsters - Secrets of the Sea
programme.desc: Jeremy goes behind the scenes and we see what went into the making of a season at sea.

programme.title: River Monsters - Mekong Mutilator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to south east Asia's Mekong river in search of a baby-faced killer.

programme.title: River Monsters - Alaska's Cold Water Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates a fatal incident in Alaska - is an unidentified killer at large?

programme.title: River Monsters - Flesh Ripper
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes to New Zealand looking for a dangerous creature described 200 years ago.

programme.title: River Monsters - Legend of Loch Ness
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is on a mission to track down the famous Loch Ness monster.

programme.title: River Monsters - Canadian Horror
programme.desc: The hunt for a 20-foot lake monster that attacks humans in Canada's wilderness.

programme.title: River Monsters - Russian Killer
programme.desc: The disappearance of three men in Russia proves to be a baffling case for Jeremy Wade.

programme.title: River Monsters - Jungle Terminator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates three mysterious deaths in the remote western Amazon.

programme.title: River Monsters - Devil of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy goes on a dangerous mission where he discovers a deep-sea devil.

programme.title: River Monsters - Malaysian Lake Monster
programme.desc: Two men mysteriously vanish on a remote lake in Malaysia.

programme.title: River Monsters - Deep Sea Demon
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes in search of the truth behind the sea serpent legend.

programme.title: River Monsters - Razorhead
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates reports of a creature terrorizing the Florida Keys.

programme.title: River Monsters - Demon Fish
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade journeys up the Congo River in search of the ferocious Goliath Tiger Fish.

programme.title: Beyond Justice
programme.desc: Ex-C.I.A. Agent Tom Burton (Rutger Hauer) goes to Morocco with businesswoman Christine Sanders (Carol Alt) to rescue her son, the kidnapped heir to a desert fortune.

programme.title: Red Sun
programme.desc: In 1870, a gang robs a train and steals a ceremonial Japanese sword meant as a gift for the U.S. President, prompting a manhunt to retrieve it.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: Hondo is told to help make peace with Indian Chief Vittoro, whose daughter--Hondo's wife--had been killed by the Cavalry. Once the peace pipe is smoked, Hondo must deal with a renegade Native American who threatens the peace by randomly attacking settlers.

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Jackie Chan plays a dual role as twins separated at birth who grow up and cross paths. Two brothers, one becomes a famous conductor and pianist in New York, another becomes a racecar driver and bodyguard in Hong Kong. When the conductor travels to Hong Kong to give a concert, the twins get caught up in each other's business, about which they are anything but experts.

programme.title: Detroit 9000
programme.desc: A pair of Detroit policemen investigates a robbery that occurred at a black congressman’s fundraising banquet.

programme.title: The Dirty Seven
programme.desc: Emanuelle is trapped in the middle of a brutal war, as both sides set out to claim her. Unfortunately for them, Emanuelle is not only beautiful but quite intelligent and uses her charms to seduce the soldiers to gain an advantage.
